summary: Updated docs/features/documents.md to document optional slug with auto-derivation and collision-safe suffixing for POST /api/docs. Changed slug row Required from yes to no, added full description of auto-derive algorithm and numeric suffixing, clarified 400 applies to explicit slug only, updated 409 row to note explicit-only collision, and added note that validateSlug is bypassed for auto-derived slugs. PATCH rename contract unchanged.
